title: Confused and I need help
excerpt: I really need to know if it works on iphone

posts.author: Believebig1 (Chigozie Anamelechi)
posts.cookedHtml: I really need to know if it works on iphone

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Believebig1,

Are you enquiring about our mobile app? If so, you can find all of the information in the articles below:

  • Is there an iPhone, iPad, tablet and/or Android mobile app?
  • How to log in with the mobile app

Let me know if this helps

posts.author: Believebig1 (Chigozie Anamelechi)
posts.cookedHtml: But I already have the app on my iPhone. How can I start accessing it ?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Once you open the app it should prompt you to log in! Can you share a screenshot of what you see on your end?
